articles.title: Institutional Investor Sentiment Remains Negative As Bitcoin Outflows Continue
articles.description: Institutional investor sentiment has been on the rocks for some time now. This follows the market trend with bitcoin falling below $22,000 and the total crypto market cap finally making its way below $1 trillion once more. With this, institutional investors continue to show a more bearish attitude toward the market. The numbers for last week are in, and the outflows from various digital assets show that big money is not betting on bitcoin. Institutional Investors Exit Bitcoin The exit from bitco

articles.title: Ontario securities regulator warns against Kucoin in latest alert
articles.description: The OSC has issued another consumer alert warning residents of unregistered crypto platforms, including Kucoin.

articles.title: Shibaswap Volume Crashes More Than $1.6B in Yearly Low
articles.description: Shibaswap saw a steep fall in trading volume in July due to a decline in the liquidity poured into alternate coins (altcoins) listed on the platform.

Bitcoin Basher Peter Schiff Pounces Again, Warns BTC Doomed For Another Terrifying Crash
articles.description: Peter Schiff, one of bitcoin’s most notorious bears, is sticking by his prediction that the benchmark cryptocurrency is on the verge of more bloodletting.

articles.title: Bitcoin (BTC) Will Not Reach New ATH Until 2025 – 7991 People Poll
articles.description: According to the results of a survey released today, 47% of respondents believe that Bitcoin (BTC) will not reach a new ATH until 2025. This result reflects the extremely pessimistic sentiment of cryptocurrency market participants, which is further confirmed by data from Google Trends.

El Salvador’s Bitcoin policy could lead the change in global monetary system – Simon Dixon
articles.description: Prominent investor Simon Dixon recently described El Salvador’s Bitcoin policy as “very responsible” and said it could be the first domino to fall in bringing down the International Monetary Fund’s (IMF) “fiat-based Ponzi scheme” debt mechanism if it succeeds.

Hacker Loses 5 ETH (~$8,000) In Failed Attack on NEAR Rainbow Bridge
articles.description: Aurora Labs CEO Alex Shevchenko said that on Aug. 22 a hacker lost 5 Ethereum (ETH) in a failed attack on the NEAR/ETH Rainbow Bridge over the weekend. No user funds were lost.

Despite Bitcoin falling on the chart and other major altcoins moving south EOS noted a considerable surge in price.
